rationale: Given the task requirements and the need to assess the current state of the project's PR and media landscape, I have evaluated the provided information and determined that the following actions are necessary: (1) Press narrative ready: partially ready, needs refinement; (2) AZ media landscape: ICTnews.az and startup.az match our story; (3) GITA grant deadline: application material is ready; (4) Startup competition pipeline: Seedstars and ASAN Innovations are relevant; (5) Founder visibility: CEO's LinkedIn presence needs improvement. Based on these assessments, my next three concrete actions are: (1) Refine the press narrative to better align with the project's goals and objectives; (2) Reach out to ICTnews.az and startup.az to explore potential media partnerships; (3) Assist the CEO in enhancing their LinkedIn presence to improve founder visibility. My PR readiness score is 6 out of 10.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed media coverage and reduced visibility
